$meta.method: live CDP browser inspection on 2 surfaces

surfaces.title: G마켓 - 지금부터의 마켓
anatomy: Top utility bar (mypage / cart / global / language)
Main header with logo + sprite-based search bar + cart icon
GNB primary nav (전체카테고리 / 베스트 / 신상마켓 / 슈퍼딜 / 알뜰쇼핑 / 브랜드데이 / G마켓Pay / 골프 / 라이브)
Vertical stack of category sections, each = h2 28px (or 24px in module variant) + 2- or 4-up card grid
Always-on price emphasis in 16-18px Gmarket Red (#da120d)
Footer with seller-services button + legal notices + corp links

surfaces.title: G마켓 - G마켓 베스트>전체
anatomy: Subheading H2 'G마켓 베스트' 28px / 400 (rare — most other H2s are 700)
Tab strip for category (전체 / 패션의류 / 패션잡화 / 뷰티 / etc.)
Ranked grid — numerical badge (1, 2, 3 ...) + thumbnail + title + final-card-discount-price + delivery chip
Right rail with quick-jump category list

naming_conventions.buttons: button__<role>  (BEM-like double underscore; e.g. button__category-all / button__layer-close / button__usermenu)
naming_conventions.sprite: sprite / sprite__common / sprite__common--before / sprite__common--after  (CSS-sprite-driven icons — legacy but production)

token_families: Club Smile sub-system (Navy 5 stops + Blue 5 stops + Gray 5 stops) — Shinsegae Universe loyalty programme branding
